examples: Yang'an line was the second main transmeridional railway which was parallel to LongHai railway.
Fracture porosity is the highest in the zone of transmeridional faults, and is higher in northeast faults than in northwest and transmeridional middle or small faults.
There are abundant fracture types including high angle shearing cracks, middling or low angle shearing cracks, transmeridional high angle tension cracks and meridional vertical shearing cracks.
